## What & why

<!-- What changes, and what problem it solves for consuming apps. -->

## Checklist

- [ ] Changeset added (`pnpm changeset`) — or `--empty` for docs/CI-only changes
- [ ] Tests cover the behavior change (`*.test.ts(x)` next to the source)
- [ ] Story added/updated for user-visible component changes (`*.stories.tsx`)
- [ ] Breaking changes called out in the changeset body with migration notes
- [ ] No app-specific coupling introduced (hard-coded URLs, untranslatable strings, business config)
